category_sources: source_facts.description says utilities for browsing procfs; official GitLab README says procps provides command-line and full-screen utilities for information from /proc.
display_name_sources: source_facts.name is procps; official GitLab project and README are titled procps.
docs_sources: Official GitLab README documents provided utilities; official repository has a Documentation directory.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo is already populated with https://gitlab.com/procps-ng/procps, so repo was not re-determined.
tags_sources: source_facts.executables lists ps, top, free, vmstat, sysctl, and related tools; official GitLab README lists utilities for process and system status from procfs.
